typical_classifier_prompt.comment: A representative classifier call: ~250 tokens of system + input, ~50 tokens of output (label + brief reasoning). Per-call cost below uses these values.

providers.label: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7
providers.notes: Anthropic's flagship reasoning model. Common premium classifier choice for high-stakes labels.

providers.label: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6
providers.notes: Anthropic's workhorse. The most-used production classifier across the Anthropic line.

providers.label: Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5
providers.notes: Anthropic's fast tier. Frequent default for high-volume classifier workloads.

providers.label: OpenAI GPT-5.4 mini
providers.notes: OpenAI's cheap frontier-tier. Strong classifier accuracy at a fraction of GPT-5.5's per-call cost.

providers.label: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro
providers.notes: Google's current frontier (preview). Strong long-context for classifier prompts with retrieval.

providers.label: Google Gemini 3 Flash
providers.notes: Google's cheap-and-fast frontier tier. Often the lowest cost-per-call from a frontier lab.

providers.label: xAI Grok 4.20 (reasoning)
providers.notes: xAI's current reasoning-grade model. Useful when Grok is already in the stack.

providers.label: DeepSeek V3.2
providers.notes: Open-weights frontier with aggressive pricing. Common cheap baseline for high-volume classifiers.

providers.label: Ollama (local)
providers.notes: Local inference; per-call cost is notional electricity (~$0.00002/call on Apple Silicon). Zero per-token billing; latency is the trade-off.

disclaimer: Per-call cost is the typical classifier prompt cost (250 input + 50 output tokens) at the listed input/output prices. Prices are pulled weekly from BerriAI/litellm's community-maintained catalog; verify current rates with the provider before sizing a contract.
